methods.method_name: Ice Core Sample Collection and Storage
methods.description: Process for collecting ice core samples from the NEEM site and transporting them to the laboratory for storage and analysis.

steps.description: Samples for levoglucosan determination were transported in a frozen state from the field to Ca' Foscari University of Venice laboratory, where they were stored in a −20°C cold room until analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: transport ice core samples to laboratory and store at -20°C
outputs: frozen ice core samples stored in laboratory

methods.description: Analytical procedure for determining levoglucosan in ice core samples using liquid chromatography and mass spectrometry.

steps.description: We slightly modified the analytical procedure for determining levoglucosan using liquid chromatography/negative ion electrospray ionization-tandem mass spectrometry (HPLC/(-)ESI-MS/MS).

methods.method_name: Continuous Flow Analysis for Major Ions
methods.description: Measurement of NH4+ and other major ions in the NEEM ice core using continuous flow analysis directly in the field.

steps.description: NH4+ and the other major ions were measured by CFA on the deep NEEM core directly in the field during the 2009 season.
steps.searchable_summary: measure NH4+ and major ions using CFA in the field

methods.description: Development of an age model for the NEEM ice core using volcanic markers and annual layer counting.

steps.description: The upper 1419 m of deep NEEM core δ18O, volcanic fingerprints, electrical conductivity measurement, dielectrical profiling, and impurity records can be matched to the NGRIP GICC05 extended timescale.
steps.searchable_summary: match NEEM core data to NGRIP GICC05 timescale

steps.description: Annual layer counting based on seasonal variations in a number of elements and chemical species, constrained by the known volcanic markers in the deep NEEM and other ice cores, was used to determine the age model with dating uncertainty of < 1 year.
steps.searchable_summary: perform annual layer counting using seasonal variations and volcanic markers

methods.description: Measurement of black carbon (BC) concentrations in the NEEM-2011-S1 core using a continuous ice core melter system.

steps.description: BC was measured using a continuous ice core melter system in the 410 m NEEM-2011-S1 core collected adjacent to the deep NEEM core in 2011.
steps.searchable_summary: measure BC concentrations using continuous ice core melter system
